CivicCase.title: Civic Case
CivicCase.description: An evidence-backed civic case file representing a community issue.

reportedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when it was reported

AuditEvent.title: Audit Event
AuditEvent.description: Audit and timeline events for civic actions.

/civicproof_cases/{caseId}.description: Primary collection storing all verified citizen reports and cases.

/civicproof_events/{eventId}.description: Collection storing security logs and audit events.

/civicproof_dead_letters/{letterId}.description: Dead letter queue for failed transactions or notifications.
